title: Senior Spectrum Engineer
description:
## About the role

The Communications Commission of Kiribati is seeking a **Senior Spectrum Engineer** to lead the planning, assignment, and monitoring of the national radio-frequency spectrum.

### Responsibilities

- Manage spectrum assignments and the national frequency register.
- Conduct interference investigations and field measurements.
- Advise on international coordination with the ITU.

### Requirements

- Degree in Electrical/Telecommunications Engineering.
- 5+ years of spectrum management experience.
- Strong analytical and reporting skills.
applicationInstructions:
Submit your CV and a cover letter to **recruitment@cck.gov.ki** with the subject line *"Senior Spectrum Engineer"*.

Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Consumer Affairs Officer
description:
## About the role

We are hiring a **Consumer Affairs Officer** to handle consumer complaints and promote awareness of telecommunication consumer rights across Kiribati.

### Responsibilities

- Receive, investigate, and resolve consumer complaints.
- Develop consumer education materials and campaigns.
- Liaise with operators on service-quality matters.

### Requirements

- Degree in Law, Public Administration, or a related field.
- Excellent communication skills in English and Kiribati.
applicationInstructions:
Apply by email to **recruitment@cck.gov.ki** with your CV, cover letter, and two references.

Please quote the position title in your subject line.

title: ICT Intern (Closed)
description:
## About the role

A three-month internship supporting the ICT team with day-to-day systems administration and help-desk duties.

This posting is retained for reference; the application window has closed.
applicationInstructions: This opening is now closed. Please monitor this page for future opportunities.
